title: Copilot FinOps unified config (v2)
description: Schema for config/copilot-finops*.yml. v2 merges the two v1 files (budget-policies + cost-center-members) into one document and renames the vocabulary (scope/credit_scope, teams/users/organization/cost_center, amount/stop_at_limit/alert_admins). It validates structure, types, enums, typo protection (additionalProperties:false) AND the structural cross-field rules: per-scope required/forbidden fields, enterprise/organization mutual exclusivity, the credit_scope->stop_at_limit constraint, and the budget-policy baseline cardinality (a non-empty ai_credit_spend_policies must contain exactly one all_users policy, with at most one optional enterprise policy). The cardinality rule uses contains + minContains/maxContains, which is why this schema targets draft 2020-12 (v1 stays on draft-07). Both lists are optional (write only what you need); only version is required, and an empty/omitted policy list is a valid no-op. Runtime-only rules — enterprise slug resolution from CLI/entry/top-level (rule 9) and live cost center name->ID + team membership (rule L) — plus value defaulting (rule D) stay in scripts/validate-config.sh and the apply/sync scripts, not here. v1 remains frozen under schemas/v1/.

version.title: Config version
version.description: Config contract version. Required for v2 so scripts/validate-config.sh routes the file to schemas/v2/. v1 configs (version omitted or 1) keep validating against schemas/v1/.

enterprise_slug.title: Enterprise slug
enterprise_slug.description: GitHub Enterprise slug. Optional here; may instead be passed via --enterprise-slug or a per-entry enterprise:. At least one must resolve at runtime (enforced by the apply/sync scripts, not this schema).

api.title: API endpoint overrides
api.description: Advanced REST endpoint overrides. Leave unset for github.com; only set when proxying the GitHub API. Not shown in example configs by convention.

budgets_endpoint_template.title: Budgets endpoint template
budgets_endpoint_template.description: Template for listing and writing budgets. Supports placeholders such as {enterprise} and {org} depending on script context.

cost_centers_list_endpoint_template.title: Cost centers list endpoint template
cost_centers_list_endpoint_template.description: Template for listing enterprise cost centers.

cost_center_endpoint_template.title: Cost center endpoint template
cost_center_endpoint_template.description: Template for reading or creating a single cost center by ID.

cost_center_resource_endpoint_template.title: Cost center resource endpoint template
cost_center_resource_endpoint_template.description: Template for adding or removing cost-center user resources.

ai_credit_spend_policies.title: AI-credit spend policies
ai_credit_spend_policies.description: List of AI-credit spend policies to reconcile. Optional — omit it (or use []) to skip budgets entirely. At most one enterprise policy is allowed (it is optional). When the list is non-empty it must also contain exactly one all_users policy (the required default). An empty/omitted list is a valid no-op.

allOf.$comment: At most one enterprise policy (optional). minContains:0 makes it optional; maxContains:1 caps it.
Exactly one all_users policy is required once the list is non-empty.

team_cost_center_mappings.title: Team cost center mappings
team_cost_center_mappings.description: List of team -> cost center membership mappings. Optional — omit it (or use []) to skip member sync entirely.

budgetPolicy.title: AI-credit spend policy
budgetPolicy.description: One budget policy to reconcile. The scope controls which identity fields are required or forbidden.

name.title: Policy name
name.description: Local label used in logs and the --policy-name filter. Never sent to the API.

description.title: Description
examples: Default per-user AI-credit budget for all licensed users.

scope.title: Budget scope
scope.description: Budget scope: selects what the budget caps and how it materializes.

oneOf.title: All users
oneOf.description: Default per-user budget for every licensed user (multi_user_customer). Always hard-stop.

oneOf.title: Enterprise
oneOf.description: One enterprise-wide budget capping total metered spend after the shared pool. Optional; at most one per config.

oneOf.title: Cost center
oneOf.description: One named cost center budget. Requires cost_center.

oneOf.title: Team
oneOf.description: Materialized from each listed team's membership; requires teams (one or more slugs) + credit_scope (pool_then_metered or metered_only). Written on the enterprise billing endpoint.

oneOf.title: Organization
oneOf.description: An org's budget, materialized from org membership; requires organization + credit_scope. Written on the org billing endpoint.

oneOf.title: User
oneOf.description: One hard-stop budget for each login in the users list. Written on the enterprise billing endpoint.

enterprise.title: Enterprise override
enterprise.description: Per-entry enterprise slug override. Mutually exclusive with organization.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Organization login. On scope: team its presence marks an org team membership source; on scope: organization it names the org the budget belongs to (and selects the org billing endpoint). Mutually exclusive with enterprise.

cost_center.title: Cost center
cost_center.description: Cost center name (resolved to its ID at apply time, sent as budget_entity_name). Required for scope: cost_center; an optional explicit destination for a single-team scope: team + credit_scope: metered_only policy (derived when omitted, and forbidden when more than one team is listed).

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Bare team slugs (no ent: prefix); the policy is applied to each listed team. Required (one or more) for scope: team.

users.title: Users
users.description: GitHub logins to budget; each login gets its own hard-stop user budget. Required (one or more) for scope: user. Not used by any other scope.

credit_scope.title: Credit scope
credit_scope.description: Which AI-credit spend a budget covers, for scope: team and scope: organization.

oneOf.title: Pool then metered
oneOf.description: One per-member user budget covering the shared pool then metered (additional) usage. Always hard-stop.

oneOf.title: Metered only
oneOf.description: Covers collective metered (additional) usage only — for team a cost center budget, for organization a single org-scope budget.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Budget cap in whole USD. Maps to budget_amount.

stop_at_limit.title: Stop at limit
stop_at_limit.description: Hard-stop usage at the cap (maps to prevent_further_usage). Optional; defaults to true. Forced true for all_users and for team + credit_scope: pool_then_metered (per-member user budgets always hard-stop).

alert_admins.title: Alert admins
alert_admins.description: Logins to alert when the budget is hit. Optional; defaults to []. A non-empty list enables alerting.

remove_extra_members.title: Remove extra members
remove_extra_members.description: Only valid for scope: team + credit_scope: metered_only. true prunes cost-center members who left the team (full sync); false (default) is additive.

allOf.$comment: Rule 1: cost_center policies require cost_center and forbid unrelated identity/sync fields.
Rule 4: enterprise policies forbid team/cost-center/org identity fields and sync-only fields.
Rule 3: all_users policies forbid identity fields and force stop_at_limit true.
Rule 2: team policies require teams and credit_scope.
Rule 5: team + pool_then_metered materializes as per-member user budgets; no cost center or member pruning, always hard-stop.
Rule 7: organization policies require organization + credit_scope and never use team, cost_center, enterprise override, or member pruning.
Organization + pool_then_metered creates per-member user budgets and always hard-stops.
Rule 11: user policies require users, forbid every other identity/sync field, and force stop_at_limit true (user-level budgets always hard-stop).
team + metered_only with multiple teams fans out to one derived cost center per team, so an explicit cost_center is ambiguous and forbidden when more than one team is listed.

mapping.title: Team cost center mapping
mapping.description: One ongoing team -> cost center membership sync mapping.

name.title: Mapping name
name.description: Local label used in logs and the --mapping-name filter.

description.title: Description
examples: Keep org team platform-engineering exactly in sync with its cost center.

enterprise.title: Enterprise override
enterprise.description: Per-entry enterprise slug override for an enterprise team source. Mutually exclusive with organization.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Organization login for an org team source. Mutually exclusive with enterprise.

team.title: Team
team.description: Source team slug (bare, no ent: prefix).

cost_center.title: Cost center
cost_center.description: Destination cost center name (resolved to its ID at sync time).

remove_extra_members.title: Remove extra members
remove_extra_members.description: true = strict reconcile (remove cost-center members no longer in the team); false (default) = additive.
